burn.voice.intent.description: AI-callable Burn voice intent emitter for an active call. Thin surface: it builds and validates a stable voice intent and either prints it (dry-run) or posts it to Burn Voice Cloud. It does not implement ASR/TTS, queueing, timeline delivery, or provider access.

modes.dry-run: Default. Build and print the exact JSON payload with no network call.
modes.gateway: POST the intent envelope to Burn Voice Cloud using BURN_VOICE_GATEWAY_URL and a scoped BURN_VOICE_CALL_TOKEN.

ids.semantics: Optional overrides for generationId/nodeId/segmentId/intentId; auto-generated when omitted.

pagination.semantics: Single intent emission; no paginated output.

semantics.envelope: Top-level object carries ok, schema, mode, intent, and a redaction note; gateway mode adds a redacted gateway result.
semantics.intent: Canonical voice intent with stable ids; text or soundRef is populated per intent kind, the other stays an empty string.
semantics.source: Emitter identity; defaults to "ai" since the AI owns speech intent.

burn.voice.intent.emptySemantics: There is no empty result; a well-formed call always returns exactly one intent object.

security.call_token: Scoped call token is read from BURN_VOICE_CALL_TOKEN/--call-token, sent only as an Authorization: Bearer header, and never echoed; output shows Bearer ***redacted***.
security.gateway_url: Sensitive query params and userinfo in surfaced urls are masked.
security.payload: Intent payload carries speech/audio/control intent only — no provider keys or secrets.

errors.voice_intent_unknown: Intent name is not one of the recognized voice intents.
errors.voice_intent_missing_call_id: No callId provided via flag or environment.
errors.voice_gateway_timeout: Gateway request exceeded the configured timeout.
errors.voice_gateway_post_failed: Gateway request failed before a response was received.

semantics.profile: safe local profile inventory with masked path_display and history counts only
semantics.account: safe public identity fields only; full emails, raw account ids, tokens, cookies and credentials are never emitted
semantics.availability: launchability/auth state; unknowns use empty strings or nulls plus code/message
semantics.availability.quota: stable summary fields; Claude stale quota keeps windows empty and exposes quota_unavailable_reason/stale_evidence separately
semantics.frontend: Flutter-friendly display status and badge fields

semantics.account: same row shape as burn.agent.accounts.list accounts[] or null when profile_id is unknown

semantics.source_specific: when source is codex or claude, active is the active source profile row when present
semantics.no_source: active_candidates/accounts contain all active source candidates; active is the first launchable candidate when possible so consumers do not see an empty shape while source-specific candidates exist
semantics.active_reason: CODEX_HOME, CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, provider default, or missing-env fallback reason
semantics.env_keys: safe environment key names only; never values

semantics.codex_live: live mode uses official Codex app-server account/rateLimits/read and starts no model turn
semantics.claude_live: Claude exact quota windows are populated only from fresh official Claude Code statusLine rate_limits cache
semantics.claude_stale: stale or missing Claude quota keeps windows and remaining fields empty; reason and stale_evidence are separate diagnostic fields

create.description: Read-only status by default; relay callers do not initialize or migrate the store through status.

semantics.schema: relay response schema; storage schema is exposed separately as store_schema
semantics.app_home_display: relay-safe local display path; raw absolute paths are not required by Flutter
semantics.store_id: Burn-owned app store id, not a provider account id
semantics.diagnostics: schema and required-directory readiness reasons with no secrets

burn.store.status.emptySemantics: A missing or uninitialized store is a successful read with store_exists/store_ready/initialized=false and diagnostics.ready_reason explaining why; it is not a transport error.

errors.burn_store_failed: Store metadata could not be inspected; response uses the standard relay error envelope with code/message and no data payload.
errors.local_policy_denied: Relay authorization or root policy rejected the command before store inspection.

create.description: Doctor is read-only unless a future explicit repair command is introduced.

semantics.schema: relay response schema; storage schema is exposed separately as store_schema
semantics.checks: per-check booleans for app home, meta, required directories and schema currency

burn.store.doctor.emptySemantics: Missing store state returns checks with ok=false and diagnostics; consumers render setup/repair state rather than treating the command as absent.

errors.burn_store_failed: Store diagnostics could not be inspected.
errors.local_policy_denied: Relay authorization or root policy rejected the command.

scan_scope.description: all-history scans every local Codex/Claude history root discovered under HOME and ignores active CODEX_HOME/BURN_AGENT_PROFILE_ID root constraints; configured/active keeps runner/profile-specific env behavior.

runtime_tuning.description: snapshot.get all-history scans are expensive on machines with hundreds of local Codex/Claude transcripts; the adapter coalesces inflight scans and keeps a short warm cache across one user refresh.

scan.emptyAndErrorSemantics: Unknown or unavailable diagnostics are empty strings/nulls; partial=true and errors[] identify cache/read/write or scan partial states. Provider raw histories are read-only.

--scope.description: all-history is the catalog/default scan; configured/active preserves active profile or CODEX_HOME/CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR behavior.

project.description: Authorized project path or project identifier resolved by adapter path policy.

profile_id.description: Optional explicit discovered profile id such as codex:default or claude:default.

pagination.semantics: The command returns the newest bounded session list for the selected source/project/profile. Pagination for full transcript content is on burn.agent.session.show.

semantics.sessions: Newest provider sessions already scoped by source/project/profile; no raw transcript payloads.
semantics.provider: Runtime, transport, profile and diagnostic fields; unknown values are empty strings/nulls.

burn.agent.sessions.list.emptySemantics: No sessions is a successful response with sessions=[] and provider diagnostics. Flutter renders an empty history state.

errors.missing_project: project is required or cannot be resolved inside authorized roots.
errors.local_policy_denied: Project path is outside authorized roots.
errors.profile_unavailable: No usable profile can satisfy the request.
errors.burn_agent_failed: Provider CLI or adapter source command failed; the relay envelope includes code/message/cause_code.

latest.description: When true, adapter may return the newest page instead of cursor order.

pagination.limit: Maximum normalized messages returned; capped at 200.

semantics.messages: Normalized readable transcript blocks only; provider raw JSON is not required by Flutter and must stay redacted unless exposed through a debug-only artifact.
semantics.cursor_fields: Pagination state is emitted as top-level cursor/prev_cursor/next_cursor/end_of_history/total_messages fields. Flutter accepts an optional nested page object only for forward compatibility.

burn.agent.session.show.emptySemantics: An existing empty session returns messages=[] with end_of_history=true and next_cursor=null. Unknown session returns a provider not-found error, not an empty success.

errors.session_not_found: No provider history row matches the requested session_id/profile/project.

cursor.description: Phone's current transcript cursor; watch emits when latest page advances.

pagination.semantics: Short-lived watch lease emits progress events only; phone pulls burn.agent.session.show/messagePage for durable JSONL truth.

semantics.event: A lightweight wakeup that the selected session transcript changed. It is not the message payload.
semantics.final: Lease completion marker; caller may immediately re-arm while the chat screen remains open.

burn.agent.session.watch.emptySemantics: No changes during the lease is a successful final response with emitted=0.

errors.burn_agent_failed: Provider source show command failed during watch polling.

options.description: Provider SDK options allowed by the managed adapter.

command_id.description: Client stable id used to correlate progress and interruption.

semantics.stream_false: Final response is returned in data after provider turn completes.
semantics.stream_true: Progress events use schema burn.agent.turn.event.v1 and final response keeps the same final shape.
semantics.turn_id: May be empty/null for providers that do not expose a durable turn id; interrupt should then use command_id/session_id fallback.

burn.agent.session.create.emptySemantics: Prompt cannot be empty. Provider may return empty reply text only with status/code diagnostics; Flutter must render a failed or empty provider response state.

errors.profile_unavailable: No launchable account/profile can start a new turn.
errors.burn_agent_failed: Provider command failed; code/message/cause_code are relay-visible.

semantics.session_id: Echoes the continued session id or provider-normalized id.
semantics.provider: Includes runtime/profile/transport and unknown fields explicitly empty.

burn.agent.session.continue.emptySemantics: Empty prompt is rejected. If the session has no readable prior messages but provider accepts continuation, the final turn shape is still returned.

errors.session_not_found: Session cannot be resolved for the source/project/profile.

semantics.active_process: If the adapter owns an active local process, it sends SIGTERM then SIGKILL fallback and returns status=interrupted.
semantics.provider_fallback: If no active process registry match exists, provider-specific interrupt support may be attempted through the CLI.
semantics.id_matching: turn_id is preferred; session_id and command_id are fallback correlation keys.

burn.agent.turn.interrupt.emptySemantics: No matching active process is a structured not-found/provider error, not a false success.

errors.turn_not_found: No active process or provider turn matches the identifiers.

force.description: For non-refresh commands, force may rebuild Burn-owned derived cache only; provider raw history is read-only.

pagination.semantics: Summary is aggregate. Drill-down commands use their own bounded limit fields.

semantics.totals: input/output/total token and cost totals when exact local parse is available; unavailable totals are null with exact_token_totals_available=false.
semantics.coverage: history files scanned, skipped, max_files/max_depth limits, partial/error state and cache status.
semantics.by_source/by_profile: Arrays may be empty; rows use safe profile ids and masked paths only.

burn.agent.usage.summary.emptySemantics: No matching history returns ok=true with zero counts, empty row arrays, null costs, and coverage explaining filters.

errors.invalid_filter: Filter or date range is malformed.

semantics.refreshed: True when Burn-owned derived usage cache was rebuilt or updated.
semantics.cache: Burn app store/cache metadata only; provider raw histories are never written.

burn.agent.usage.refresh.emptySemantics: No matching files returns ok=true, refreshed=false, and coverage.scanned=0.

semantics.store_ready: Burn-owned local usage store/cache readiness, not provider account status.
semantics.last_refresh: Null when no cache has been built.

burn.agent.usage.status.emptySemantics: No cache returns ok=true with cache.exists=false and last_refresh=null.

semantics.activity/heatmap/dimensions: Pre-shaped Flutter dashboard data; arrays are safe to render empty.

burn.agent.usage.snapshot.emptySemantics: No matching usage returns zero totals and empty activity/heatmap/dimensions arrays.

semantics.totals: Token/cost totals or nulls with availability booleans.
semantics.currency: Empty string when costs are unavailable.

burn.agent.usage.totals.emptySemantics: No usage returns zero token counts when exact totals are available, otherwise null totals and availability=false.

pagination.semantics: Activity is bounded by limit; future cursor fields may be added without breaking current consumers.

burn.agent.usage.activity.emptySemantics: No matching usage returns activity=[] and page.has_more=false.

errors.usage_ledger_failed: Activity view could not be produced.

burn.agent.usage.heatmap.emptySemantics: No matching usage returns heatmap=[]; Flutter renders a blank heatmap state.

errors.usage_ledger_failed: Heatmap view could not be produced.

semantics.profiles: Safe ids/labels only; raw account ids and raw paths are not emitted.
semantics.date_range: Null bounds when no usage has been indexed.

burn.agent.usage.filters.emptySemantics: No usage returns empty sources/profiles/projects and date_range bounds null.

errors.usage_ledger_failed: Filter options could not be produced.

semantics.partial: True when some local history files could not be parsed but safe partial data exists.

burn.agent.usage.diagnostics.emptySemantics: No usage cache/history returns ok=true with coverage counts at 0 and warnings explaining missing inputs.

semantics.models: Pricing assumptions used for local cost estimates; may be empty when costs are unavailable.

burn.agent.usage.pricing.emptySemantics: Unknown pricing returns models=[] and cost_totals_available=false in usage views.

errors.usage_ledger_failed: Pricing table could not be read.

burn.agent.usage.dimensions.emptySemantics: No usage returns dimensions with known names and values=[] so Flutter can render disabled filters.

errors.usage_ledger_failed: Dimension list could not be produced.

burn.agent.usage.dimension.emptySemantics: No values for a valid dimension returns values=[] and page.has_more=false.

errors.invalid_dimension: dimension is not one of the public usage dimensions.
errors.usage_ledger_failed: Dimension view could not be produced.

pagination.semantics: Only rows in the selected compact view are bounded.

semantics.rows: Compact view rows safe for Flutter list/chart rendering.

burn.agent.usage.compact.emptySemantics: No usage returns a zero/empty summary and rows=[].

errors.usage_ledger_failed: Compact usage view could not be produced.
